description: Let workspace admins invite, manage, revoke, and audit membership changes.

userStories.title: Add workspace membership role and invitation support
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want membership records to support invitations and editable roles so that admin actions use consistent domain rules.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace membership domain supports viewer, editor, and admin roles
Pending invitations store invitee email and workspace context
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Invite workspace members by email
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that I can grant access without database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings page accepts an email address and target role for a new invitation
Submitting an invitation creates a pending invitation for the selected workspace
Invitation action records an audit entry for the invite event
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Change workspace member roles
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role so that access matches current responsibilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings page lets admins switch member roles between viewer, editor, and admin
Role changes persist immediately for the selected member
Role change action records an audit entry with previous and new roles
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Revoke workspace access
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so that I can remove members when needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings page provides a revoke action for existing members
Revoking access removes or disables the member record for that workspace
Revoke action records an audit entry for the removal event
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Show recent membership changes in workspace settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can audit who was invited, updated, or removed.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings page shows recent membership audit entries in reverse chronological order
Audit view includes invite, role change, and revoke events with actor and timestamp details
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
